gist.headline: Air support returns
gist.blurb: Imagen 4, Grok Video, and Qwen Character are back online. The signal has been re-acquired.
gist.summary: Re-enabled access to Imagen 4, Grok Video, and Qwen Character models following upstream API restoration.
gist.impact: Users can once again access these specific image, video, and text generation models via the API.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy garden radar station where the bee and robot are detecting returning signals (the models). Represents the 'Airforce' connection coming back online.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the bee mascot and monitor robot at a garden radar station with a lime green (#ecf874) dish. The robot's screen glows with three distinct signal blips. Soft pastel gradient sky. Text in pixel font: 'ONLINE'. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic.
